A lot of people talk about hiring great talent

Far fewer talk about building the environment where that talent actually does its best work

- Creative freedom
- Ownership
- Systems that evolve with feedback
- Room to experiment
- Safety to make mistakes
- A chance to learn from

If you spent half the time you spend doomscrolling on X or Instagram on Pinterest, I bet you’d be 10x more creative 

(Doesn’t matter what you do for a living)

every round i log which flags were real and which i rejected with a reason

cooperate and your reviews get lighter
flag noise and you get read harder

one model runs 0.91 precision. one runs 0.58, half its flags just prescribe away my voice

been reading axelrod. the evolution of cooperation

so i made my ai reviewers play it

three models grade my drafts. now they have to earn the right to be trusted

turns out review isn't about how many eyes

it's which eyes have been right before

tit for tat, but the players are the models grading you
